prose: Frontier orbital gap for pyridine calculated using DFT (B3LYP/def2-TZVP functional and basis set, tier 'standard') in PySCF. The geometry provided from /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/pyridine/pyridine.xyz was utilized without further optimization. The calculation was performed in the gas phase with charge 0 and multiplicity 1. The SCF cycles converged successfully within 10 iterations without warnings. The HOMO energy was -7.2526 eV, LUMO energy -1.11279 eV, leading to a frontier orbital gap of 6.13981 eV. The task was performed using the frontier-orbitals skill, and no warnings were reported. The computation was deemed trustworthy according to the integrity checks and the result was written to /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmps8stvlel/live.json
